name: vigil
_comment: The Emberhold premise made into one picture: the Vanguard drawn up around the sacred brazier — two per side, casters (cleric/mage) close to the flame, fighters (knight/ranger) on the outer wings with their weapons turned OUTWARD — while the Shadow's monsters close in from the edges and the dark of the long night presses in behind (the mage_sh backdrop). Pure REUSE: a `scene` that stamps sprites already in the group (brazier at its tall flame frame, the four heroes, slime/skeleton/bats), no new art. The warm gold glow-pool under the brazier is the light this whole world is besieged to keep.
